species: we report that Staphylococcus nepalensis releases corisin...
tissue: apoptosis of lung alveolar epithelial cells plays a role in disease progression.
cell_type: to induce apoptosis of lung epithelial cells.
disease_state: Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) is a chronic and fatal disease...

age: This study comprised 34 Japanese patients with stable idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF; mean age: 71.7 ± 6.6 years-old)...
